summary: Tested StudyOS / ContextOS end-to-end. 18/18 backend pytest cases pass (auth, topics seed/idempotency, sessions CRUD + struggle + mastery delta + clamping, real Claude Sonnet 4.5 chat + history). Frontend Playwright flows pass: signup → ContextMap (10 nodes + hover card + Next-Path SVG + weakest topic ring), topic-node click → ZenFrame with framer-motion morph, duration select, begin → timer ticks, struggle slider crosses 60 → pulse-cyan↔pulse-amber class swap + amber timer color (rgb(255,149,0)) + 'cognitive load high' HUD label, hover difficult terms shows quick-ref card, ghost-nudge appears, sidekick panel slide-in works and chat history persists across close/reopen, finish returns to map, logout clears localStorage token, re-login still shows exactly 10 topics (idempotent seed). No backend, integration, or critical UI bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses `logger` inside socratic() (line 356) before it is defined at module level (line 395). Works at runtime because route handlers execute lazily, but is unintuitive — move logging.basicConfig + logger above route definitions for safety.

Socratic /chat/socratic replays full history every call by re-sending all prior user messages through LlmChat. This is O(N) latency per message and double-bills tokens; consider passing history as a single context block or using LlmChat's native session memory instead of re-sending.

Range input (struggle-slider) is React-controlled; standard Playwright .fill / .value= won't trigger React state. Not a product bug but document for future testers — use the native value-setter dispatch trick or page.locator(...).fill('80').
End-of-session calls `endNow(false)` from exit-zen-btn which applies mastery_delta=-1 silently. Consider differentiating 'exit without grading' from 'fail'.
ZenFrame.jsx is ~415 lines and embeds QUICK_REFS, ghost-nudge logic, timer, struggle, sidekick container, render helpers. Splittable into smaller hooks/components for maintainability.
test_credentials: Tests create fresh randomized signups against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL each run; no shared test user. Format: test_<8hex>@example.com / test-pass-1234.
seed_data_creation: Each new signup auto-seeds 10 default topics via _seed_topics_for(); idempotent on subsequent logins (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py -v`. Use email like @example.com (NOT @*.test — pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs). For struggle-slider in Playwright, set value via native HTMLInputElement value-setter then dispatch 'input' event; otherwise React state won't update. Claude reply latency 5–20s; allow up to 60s per call. App was healthy on first test — no fixes were applied to product code.
